league.headline: The national show starts with the standings board and the daily pitching slate.
verified_notes: MLB.com standings provides the league board for division and wild-card framing.
MLB.com probable-pitchers provides the daily matchup slate.
ESPN MLB transactions provides the broad move tracker.
UNVERIFIED: Standings snapshot not confirmed from available sources.
UNVERIFIED: Probable-pitcher slate not confirmed from available sources.
stories: Lead with the biggest standings truth on the board.
Use the probable-pitchers page to identify the best matchup.
Use only verified league transaction notes before air; treat anything marked UNVERIFIED as a placeholder to check.
watch: UNVERIFIED: Pitching watch not confirmed from available sources.
transactions: UNVERIFIED: League transactions not confirmed from available sources.

athletics.headline: The A's are in first, but the better question is whether the underlying signs make that start feel sturdy.
verified_notes: Snapshot verified from MLB.com team pages, ESPN transactions, and Baseball Savant.
UNVERIFIED: Athletics record not confirmed from available sources..
MLB.com probable-pitchers page live for Athletics.
placed CF Denzel Clarke on the 10-day injured list.
recalled RF Colby Thomas from Las Vegas Aviators.
optioned RHP Mason Barnett to Las Vegas Aviators.
notes: The A's story starts with the standings reality and whether the run differential supports it.
Use the probable-pitcher page as the game-preview peg.
Use transaction notes only when they are confirmed on the source page.

rockies.headline: The Rockies conversation starts with how ugly the early math looks and whether there is any believable next-step hope.
verified_notes: Snapshot verified from MLB.com team pages, ESPN transactions, and Baseball Savant.
UNVERIFIED: Rockies record not confirmed from available sources..
MLB.com probable-pitchers page live for Rockies.
placed RHP Ryan Feltner on the 15-day injured list.
recalled LHP Sammy Peralta from Albuquerque Isotopes.
placed RHP Jimmy Herget on the paternity list.
notes: The Rockies tone starts with the standings board and whether the pain looks temporary or structural.
Use the probable-pitcher page as the preview peg.
Use verified transactions to sharpen the pitching conversation.

tigers.headline: The Tigers feel like the most upward-looking homer segment if the winning record and run differential still hold up.
verified_notes: Snapshot verified from MLB.com team pages, ESPN transactions, and Baseball Savant.
UNVERIFIED: Tigers record not confirmed from available sources..
MLB.com probable-pitchers page live for Tigers.
placed LHP Bailey Horn on the 60-day injured list.
optioned LHP Enmanuel De Jesus to Toledo Mud Hens.
selected the contract of RHP Burch Smith from Toledo Mud Hens.
signed free agent OF Caleb Shpur to a minor league contract.
notes: The Tigers segment should sound more hopeful if the record and run differential still support it.
Use the AL Central position and run differential to give the segment structure.
Keep injury and roster notes tied to MLB.com and ESPN logs.
